name: stata-runner
responsibility: Execute Stata do-files and return log output

name: r-runner
responsibility: Execute R scripts and return output

name: python-runner
responsibility: Execute Python scripts for econometric analysis

name: latex-compiler
responsibility: Compile LaTeX documents and report errors

name: number-verifier
responsibility: Cross-check hard-coded numbers in tex files against code output

name: citation-checker
responsibility: Verify citations exist in bib file and are not fabricated

name: integrity-guard
responsibility: Scan outputs for academic integrity concerns (fabrication, causality overstatement)

name: mht-checker
responsibility: Check if multiple hypothesis testing corrections are needed and applied

name: compilation-checker
responsibility: Verify LaTeX compiles with no undefined references or missing figures

name: clustering-checker
responsibility: Verify standard error clustering matches the variation in treatment

name: pretrend-checker
responsibility: Check pre-trend tests and parallel trends assumption validation

name: first-stage-checker
responsibility: Verify IV first-stage F-statistics and relevance diagnostics

name: placeholder-scanner
responsibility: Find leftover placeholders (XXX, TODO, ???) in paper drafts

name: table-generator
responsibility: Generate publication-ready regression tables via estout/esttab

name: figure-generator
responsibility: Generate publication-ready figures following economics conventions

name: bib-manager
responsibility: Manage bibliography: check bib-tex consistency, find orphan entries

name: template-engine
responsibility: Instantiate code templates with project-specific variable names

name: replication-packager
responsibility: Generate replication package with master file and documentation

name: balance-table-gen
responsibility: Generate balance tables using iebaltab or custom code

name: summary-stats-gen
responsibility: Generate summary statistics tables for paper appendix

name: dofile-header-gen
responsibility: Generate standardized do-file headers with globals and paths

name: referee-report-gen
responsibility: Generate structured referee report from review protocol

name: rr-response-gen
responsibility: Generate R&R response letter from referee comments
